name: Sicilian Sweet & Sour Pumpkiin Squash
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Cut the pumpkin in half and remove the seeds. Place the pumpkin cut side down on a baking sheet.
3. Bake for about 45 minutes or until tender but not mushy. The pumpkin flesh should be firm enough to cut into 1/2-inch cubes or slices.
4. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
5. In a saucepan, bring 1 cup of the stock to a boil. Cook the onions, uncovered, over moderate heat until tender.
6. When most of the liquid has evaporated, sprinkle the onions with sugar and cook until they begin to caramelize.
7. Add the vinegar and the remaining stock, and continue to cook until deep golden brown but not burned. Add water if the mixture seems dry; the onions should end up in a sweet and sour syrup.
8. Toss the pumpkin cubes with the onion mixture and stir well to coat.
9. Sprinkle with coarsely chopped mint.
